summary.key_theme: ADI 受惠於政府政策利多與穩健的股利成長策略，儘管面臨短期股價波動與競爭壓力，市場整體評價仍偏向正面。

bullish.title: Magnachip, Analog Devices, Applied Materials, KLA Corporation, and MACOM Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 川普政府宣布一項自願性計畫，直接推動半導體類股集體上漲，ADI 作為產業指標股受惠顯著。

bullish.title: Analog Devices Strengthens Global Manufacturing Resilience with New Thailand Facility
bullish.reason: ADI 在泰國啟用新製造設施，有助於提升全球供應鏈韌性，長期來看有利於產能擴張與成本控制。

bullish.title: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Analog Devices (ADI): Should You Buy?
bullish.reason: 華爾街券商平均建議評級為「買入」，顯示機構投資人對 ADI 的基本面與未來成長性持樂觀態度。

bullish.title: 5 Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Amid Rising Inflation Risk
bullish.reason: 在通膨與利率不確定性環境下，ADI 被視為具備韌性的股利成長股，吸引防禦型資金配置。

bullish.title: Analog Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) Fits the 'Growth at a Reasonable Price' Strategy
bullish.reason: 分析指出 ADI 符合 GARP (合理價格成長) 投資策略，在半導體產業中具備估值優勢。

bearish.title: Why Is Analog Devices (ADI) Down 10.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
bearish.reason: 自上季財報公布以來股價下跌 10.1%，反映市場對其獲利成長動能或財測指引的擔憂。

bearish.title: SNDK vs. ADI: Which Semiconductor Stock Has an Edge in Data Centers?
bearish.reason: 報導指出 Sandisk 在資料中心領域的成長與供應鏈優勢，對 ADI 構成競爭壓力，削弱其在該領域的市場份額預期。

neutral.title: A Look At Analog Devices (ADI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
neutral.reason: 針對近期股價波動進行的事件驅動型快照分析，未給出明確買賣建議，僅提供估值觀察。

neutral.title: Industry Comparison: Evaluating Analog Devices Against Competitors In Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment Industry
neutral.reason: 純粹的產業同業比較報告，旨在提供投資人參考基準，無明顯多空傾向。

neutral.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include Flowserve, Analog Devices, Broadcom, NVIDIA and TIM
neutral.reason: 僅為財經新聞摘要彙整，提及 ADI 作為 dividend growth 標的之一，資訊內容較為中性。
